name: census-of-coasts-tuning
description: The Census of Coasts, tuning-loop variant: identical metrics over 2,000 worlds instead of 10,000, for fast iteration during Task 9's physics tuning loop. Medians here guide the next iteration's go/no-go call; the final recorded row always re-measures at the full 10,000-seed census (census-of-coasts.study.json) before a page is finalized.
